name: West Seattle Ski, Snowboard, and Boat Swap
description: Community ski, snowboard, and boat/paddlesport consignment swap run by a West Seattle specialty gear shop, established 2009.

name: Hazel Wolf Ski Swap
description: School PTSA-run ski and winter clothing swap, 40% consignment fee, checks mailed via PTSA treasurer.

name: Walla Walla Ski Swap
description: Community ski/outdoor gear swap at Walla Walla Fairgrounds, 25% consignment fee.

name: MBSEF Skyliners Ski Swap
description: Premier Northwest ski swap combining local consignors and regional retailers, 25% commission, benefits youth snow sports programs.

name: Bend Bike Swap
description: Bike consignment swap hosted on the MySkiSwap platform despite being a bike (not ski) event.

name: Coeur d'Alene Ski Swap
description: Community ski swap at Kootenai County Fairgrounds, 25% consignment fee, admission free.

name: Team Summit's Annual Ski & Snowboard Swap
description: Nonprofit youth ski/snowboard team swap, 30% org commission, part of a larger competitive youth sports organization.

name: AK Ski & Winter Gear Swap
organizer: Alyeska Ski Club & UAA Ski Team
description: Large consignment swap (thousands of items) at UAA Alaska Airlines Center, 30% org commission, benefits youth skiing in south-central Alaska.

name: Team Afton Ski Swap
date: Late September / early October, tied to 'Fall Into Winter Festival'
description: Youth ski racing club swap, mixed individual consignment and vendor sales, 77/23 split, $2/item check-in fee.

name: Four Valleys Community School (FVCS) Ski and Sports Swap
description: Community school nonprofit swap serving Girdwood, Portage, Bird, and Indian, AK. Held at Alyeska Daylodge.

name: Buck Hill Tent Sale
description: Large-scale (100,000+ item) ski/snowboard tent sale fundraiser for a competitive youth ski racing club, $5/item + 20% commission.

name: Freeport Ski Swap and Sale
description: School booster club swap benefiting Alpine and Nordic ski teams, 75/25 split.

name: Martock Ski Race Club Ski Swap
description: Youth ski race club equipment swap at Martock Ski Lodge, Canada.
